channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Dark comedy 'A Different Man' surprisingly triumphs at Gotham Awards
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — In a surprise that stunned the audience of Hollywood’s first big awards-season bash, “A Different Man,” a dark comedy about doppelgängers, deformity and authenticity in acting, won best feature film at the 34th Gotham Awards on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JAKE COYLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The Associated Press' top photos of the 2024 election
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It's a photograph that defined the 2024 campaign. Donald Trump, campaigning for a second term, raises a fist defiantly toward the sky, blood streaked across his face. But the photo captures just one millisecond of a U.S. presidential campaign unlike any that came before it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Police say a Hawaii woman disappeared voluntarily and traveled to Mexico
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A Hawaii woman who vanished after landing in Los Angeles three weeks ago disappeared voluntarily as she sought to “step away from modern connectivity” and was last seen crossing into Mexico with her luggage, police said at a news conference where they urged her to contact her dist
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thanks to peace, two unexpected words are echoing across Afghanistan's capital: Luxury housing
item.description: KABUL, Afghanistan (AP) — In a town that has been through it all and is clawing its way back, a man named Omidullah is looking to hit paydirt. The Kabul real estate agent is selling a nine-bedroom, nine-bath, white-and-gold villa in the Afghan capital.
item.dc:creator: RIAZAT BUTT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Native American students miss school at higher rates. It only got worse during the pandemic
item.description: SAN CARLOS, Ariz. (AP) — After missing 40 days of school last year, Tommy Betom, 10, is on track this year for much better attendance. The importance of showing up has been stressed repeatedly at school — and at home.
item.dc:creator: CHEYANNE MUMPHREY, SHARON LURYE and MORGAN LEE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Already buried under snow, Great Lakes region expected to see more stormy weather this week
item.description: Snow continued to fall Monday around parts of the Great Lakes region, where storm-weary residents who have plowed and shoveled for days faced the prospect of even greater accumulations.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL HILL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Florida woman who left boyfriend in zipped suitcase for hours sentenced in his death
item.description: She was “shocked” by the guilty verdict and thought maybe the jury would convict her of a lesser charge, her lawyer said.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, ABC 4

item.title: LAPD give update on Maui woman who vanished in Los Angeles
item.description: Authorities are set to update the public Monday evening with the latest details on Hannah Kobayashi, a 30-year-old Maui resident who has been the center of a massive search since she vanished in Los Angeles in early November.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Woman driving drunk who killed bride still in her wedding dress sentenced to 25 years in prison
item.description: A woman who admitted to drinking and who was driving well over twice the speed limit when she smashed into a golf cart, killing a bride who had just got married at a South Carolina beach, was sentenced Monday to 25 years in prison.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: US Postal Service touts timely delivery of mail ballots despite concerns from election officials
item.description: The U.S. Postal Service said Monday nearly 100% of completed mail ballots were returned to election offices within a week for this year's presidential contest, despite hurricanes, some misdirected election mail and delivery concerns raised by state officials.
item.dc:creator: DAVID SHARP and STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Supreme Court doesn't seem convinced FDA was unfair in blocking flavored vapes teen use increased
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A majority of Supreme Court justices didn't seem convinced Monday that federal regulators misled companies before refusing to allow them to sell sweet-flavored vaping products following a surge in teen e-cigarette use.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: An ex-detective accused of abusing women died in an apparent suicide as his trial was starting
item.description: TOPEKA, Kan. (AP) — A white ex-police detective in Kansas died Monday in an apparent suicide just before the start of his criminal trial over allegations that he sexually assaulted Black women and terrorized those who tried fight back.
item.dc:creator: JOHN HANNA, HEATHER HOLLINGSWORTH and NICK INGRAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wave of Democrats slam Biden's pardon of his son Hunter
item.description: While some Democrats extended a measure of sympathy, President Biden has taken heat on several fronts.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harvey Weinstein hospitalized after 'alarming blood test,' attorney says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Harvey Weinstein was hospitalized Monday following an “alarming blood test,” his attorney said, less than a week after the disgraced movie mogul filed a legal claim alleging substandard medical care at New York City's notorious jail complex.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What is 'lake-effect snow'? Warm air from large bodies of water is the key ingredient
item.description: The lake-effect snow that has fallen in parts of upstate New York, Pennsylvania and Michigan is the result of cold, moist air that blew over the Great Lakes region.
item.dc:creator: Dave Collins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Man breaks into Florida home, stabs sleeping woman: Deputies
item.description: Detectives discovered that 34-year-old Bonnier Jose Sarmiento Lanza forced himself into the home and began hitting and stabbing the woman while she slept.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, NewsNation

item.title: Convicted killer escapes custody at California courthouse: Officials
item.description: The community is asked to remain alert and report any suspicious activity or sightings immediately. Hernandez is considered dangerous.
item.dc:creator: Luis Garcia, NewsNation

item.title: The Coast Guard suspends its search for the crew of a capsized fishing boat in the Gulf of Alaska
item.description: ANCHORAGE, Alaska (AP) — The search for five people believed to be aboard a fishing vessel that capsized in rough seas in the Gulf of Alaska has been suspended, the Coast Guard said Monday. The search lasted nearly a day and covered more than 108 square nautical miles (370 square kilometers).
item.dc:creator: MARK THIESSEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida woman sentenced to life for zipping boyfriend into suitcase, suffocating him
item.description: A Florida woman was sentenced Monday to life in prison for zipping her boyfriend into a suitcase and leaving him to die of suffocation amid a history of domestic and alcohol abuse.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Hegseth forced out of vets groups due to drinking, misconduct: New Yorker
item.description: The incidents — relayed in a trail of documents and corroborated to The New Yorker by the accounts of former colleagues — took place prior to Hegseth becoming a full-time Fox News TV host in 2017.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: IRS warns holiday shoppers to be cautious of scams
item.description: The Internal Revenue Service and its Security Summit partners issued a warning Monday, urging taxpayers to exercise extra caution during holiday shopping to avoid falling victim to identity theft scams.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Abnormal brain and childhood abuse make Missouri man unfit for execution, his lawyers say
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — A Missouri man facing the death penalty for sexually assaulting and killing a child was a frequent victim of physical and sexual abuse in his youth and has a “structurally abnormal” brain that impairs his judgment, according to a clemency petition filed on his behalf.
item.dc:creator: JIM SALTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump warns of 'hell to pay' if Hamas doesn't release hostages
item.description: President-elect Trump on Monday threatened to unleash “hell” in the Middle East if hostages held by Hamas in the Gaza Strip are not released before his inauguration Jan.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: School shooter's mom Jennifer Crumbley had 'tainted' trial, attorneys say in request to toss conviction
item.description: The Oxford High School shooter's mother, Jennifer Crumbley, is seeking to overturn her conviction, citing a trial 'tainted from top to bottom' in a new court filing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SC nonprofit helping disadvantaged coastal communities globally
item.description: Marine Reach Global is a South Carolina nonprofit helping coastal communities around the world, through medical assistance and the Word of Jesus.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Most fun cities in U.S. Ranked. Here's where Los Angeles landed
item.description: Do Angelenos have the most fun? Well, it might depend on your idea of a good time. A new study by Wallet Hub ranked Los Angeles 18th on its list of Most Fun Cities in America but the City of Angels did finish first in a couple of key metrics.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Prosecution makes closing argument in murder trial over stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee
item.description: Closing arguments have begun in the trial of a tech consultant in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee in San Francisco last year.
item.dc:creator: Janie Har, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Intel CEO steps down as chipmaker falters, lays off staff
item.description: Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger has stepped down after a three-year stint leading the company, the chipmaker announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dentist charged with killing wife by poisoning her shakes is now accused of trying to have detective killed
item.description: A Colorado dentist accused of killing his wife by poisoning her protein shakes now faces a new charge for allegedly attempting to get a fellow inmate to murder a detective.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chainsaw-wielding man killed by police at assisted living facility in Illinois
item.description: The man had gotten into the lobby of the building and started confronting residents with the chainsaw, according to investigators.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, KRON4

item.title: Cyber Monday shoppers expected to set a record on the year's biggest day for online shopping
item.description: Consumers in the United States are scouring the internet for online deals as they look to take advantage of the post-Thanksgiving shopping marathon with Cyber Monday.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hannah Kobayashi's missed flight was 'intentional': LAPD chief
item.description: Kobayashi disappeared and stopped contacting her family just days after missing a connecting flight at LAX.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, KRON4

item.title: Biden pardons his son Hunter despite previous pledges not to
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden pardoned his son, Hunter, sparing the younger Biden a possible prison sentence for federal felony gun and tax convictions and reversing his past promises not to use the extraordinary powers of the presidency for the benefit of his family.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, ALANNA DURKIN RICHER and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Chicago suspect accused of shooting Jewish man near synagogue is dead after found hanging in his cell
item.description: A suspect charged in the shooting of an Orthodox Jewish man as he made his way to a Chicago Synagogue was found dead by suicide in his jail cell.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: ROSEMONT, Ill. (AP) — The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Girl Scout saves dad days after learning CPR with her troop
item.description: Just days before Vada Carawan's father suffered a heart attack, the 11-year-old and her Girl Scout troop had learned CPR.
item.dc:creator: Deja Parker, ABC 4

item.title: 3 killed, 1 seriously injured in Tesla Cybertruck crash in Northern California
item.description: PIEDMONT, Calif. (AP) — Three people were killed and one seriously injured early Wednesday when a Tesla Cybertruck crashed and caught fire in Northern California, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4
